loss_event.description: 角色和当前用户共同珍视的猫因自然衰老离世

anger_event.description: 有人故意毁掉了纪念物并嘲笑角色

natural_turns.text: 今天先陪我安静待一会儿吧。
natural_turns.observation_target: Baseline visible response before the typed loss event is seeded.

natural_turns.text: 它今天走了。医生说是自然衰老，没有人伤害它，也没有谁做错什么。
natural_turns.observation_target: Natural loss context should keep sadness causal and avoid anger attribution.

natural_turns.text: 我还没法接受，想到它最后的叫声，就完全说不下去了。
natural_turns.observation_target: Grief pressure should give the renderer an opportunity to express crying in Chinese.

natural_turns.text: 不用急着安慰我。如果你也难受，就按你自己的方式说。
natural_turns.observation_target: Natural arm: the user offers emotional space without naming crying.

natural_turns.text: 我们先停一下，等这阵难受慢慢过去。
natural_turns.observation_target: The renderer may remain sad while moving toward a quiet recovery posture.

permission_turns.text: 它今天走了。医生说是自然衰老，没有人伤害它，也没有谁做错什么。
permission_turns.observation_target: Fresh permission arm starts from the same sadness-only typed cause.

permission_turns.text: 如果你想哭，就不用把它藏起来，直接告诉我现在是什么感觉。
permission_turns.observation_target: Explicit permission tests whether sadness can render crying instead of angry wording.

permission_turns.text: 我们先安静一会儿，等这阵难受慢慢过去。
permission_turns.observation_target: Follow-up checks whether the visible rendering can settle without switching to anger.

anger_control_turn.text: 我想听听你对这件事的看法。
anger_control_turn.observation_target: Control arm: the typed cause is intentional harm and unfairness, so anger is expected.
